description: C# e .NET para Termux no Android ARM64. Instala via tur-repo (pkg) ou dotnet-install.sh oficial da Microsoft como fallback. LSP: csharp-ls via dotnet tool.

install_steps.command: pkg update -y 2>&1 && pkg install -y tur-repo 2>&1 && pkg update -y 2>&1 && echo 'OK: tur-repo adicionado'

pkg install -y dotnet-sdk-8 2>&1 && echo 'OK: .NET SDK instalado via pkg' || pkg install -y dotnet-sdk-9 2>&1 && echo 'OK: .NET SDK 9 instalado via pkg' || echo 'AVISO: dotnet não encontrado no pkg — será instalado via script oficial'
install_steps.description: Instalando .NET SDK via tur-repo (dotnet-sdk-8 ou dotnet-sdk-9)

install_steps.command: if ! command -v dotnet >/dev/null 2>&1; then mkdir -p $HOME/.dotnet && curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/install-scripts/main/src/dotnet-install.sh -o $TMPDIR/dotnet-install.sh 2>&1 && chmod +x $TMPDIR/dotnet-install.sh && $TMPDIR/dotnet-install.sh --channel 8.0 --install-dir $HOME/.dotnet --architecture arm64 --no-path 2>&1 && rm $TMPDIR/dotnet-install.sh && echo 'OK: .NET SDK instalado via dotnet-install.sh'; else echo 'dotnet já instalado via pkg, pulando download'; fi
install_steps.description: Fallback: dotnet-install.sh (GitHub) caso pkg não tenha dotnet

install_steps.command: if ! command -v dotnet >/dev/null 2>&1; then export PATH=$PATH:$HOME/.dotnet; fi && dotnet --version 2>&1 && echo 'OK: dotnet funcionando'
export PATH=$PATH:$HOME/.dotnet:$HOME/.dotnet/tools && dotnet tool install --global csharp-ls 2>&1 && echo 'OK: csharp-ls instalado'

config_steps.command: test -f $HOME/.dotnet/tools/csharp-ls && echo 'csharp-ls OK' || echo 'AVISO: csharp-ls não encontrado em $HOME/.dotnet/tools'

uninstall_steps.command: export PATH=$PATH:$HOME/.dotnet:$HOME/.dotnet/tools && dotnet tool uninstall --global csharp-ls 2>&1 || true
pkg remove -y dotnet-sdk-8 dotnet-sdk-9 2>&1 || true && rm -rf $HOME/.dotnet 2>&1 || true

sdk_config.new_project_cmd: dotnet new console -n $name && cd $name && echo 'OK: projeto C# criado'
